section.h3: Commit activity per day of week

div.div: fix: update archive format to improve compression efficiency

fix: correct service enablement and disablement logic
- Ensure services are properly disabled before enabling new ones - Remove redundant service configurations - Update service timers and scripts for better reliability

fix: correct function names and improve logging configuration
- Refactor GitHub release functionality into separate mixin - Update hash function names for clarity - Enhance logging initialization to handle different log levels more robustly

fix: refactor registration methods and improve data transfer operations
- Introduced abstract base classes for rigid and non-rigid registration methods. - Refactored rigid registration to use a new TrimeshICP class. - Improved data transfer operations by adding auto, barycentric, and nearest methods. - Enhanced data transfer utility functions and updated related tests. - Fixed and optimized various parts of the codebase, including mesh handling and attribute transfer.
BREAKING CHANGE: The API for rigid and non-rigid registration methods has changed. Users should update their code to use the new abstract base classes and method implementations.
